verdict_reason: The verse refuses both easy readings — 'careerism is bad' (which would condemn the cycle) and 'careerism is fine' (which would dismiss the constitutive concern). It holds the harder, more precise diagnostic of identity-restructuring around the fruit-loop. The transliterated technical terms are kept load-bearing, not erased. The original meaning is preserved in literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus. The doctrinal scoping (saṃsāra trajectory is real but bounded; the kāmya-karma is not voided) is preserved. The verse does not claim the Sanskrit is 'really about' demo-week culture; the demo-week case is one operational analog. No trivialisation.
